name: Witch Hat Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread frosting thickly on top of each cookie.
2. In the center of the cookie, place some candies on the frosting.
3. Invert an ice-cream cone on top of the candies.
4. Spread frosting on the outer surface of the cone.
5. Optionally, decorate with a strip of fruit leather as a hatband at the base of the cone.
6. Let the frosting dry and set for about 15 minutes before eating.
7. To eat, hold by the tip of the cone.
